description: Message bus envelopes — AgentMessage DTO, MessageBag, bus commands, results, and outbox projection signals.

files.responsibility: Contract for all bus messages — runId, turnNo, stepId, attempt, idempotencyKey.
Base implementation of AgentBusMessageInterface — shared constructor for all bus messages.
Core message DTO — role, content parts, timestamp, tool metadata, details, error flag. JS-parity toArray().
Immutable wrapper around a list of LLM-formatted message objects.
Bus command to start a new run — extends AbstractAgentBusMessage with payload.
Bus command to advance/resume a run — extends AbstractAgentBusMessage with payload.
Bus command to apply a pending command — includes kind, payload, options.
Bus command to execute an LLM step — includes contextRef and toolsRef.
Bus command to execute a single tool call — toolCallId, toolName, args, orderIndex.
Bus command to collect completed tool call results by IDs.
Result of an LLM step — assistantMessage, usage, stopReason, error.
Result of a tool call execution — toolCallId, orderIndex, result, isError, error details.
Signal to trigger JSONL outbox projection — batchSize, retryDelaySeconds.
Signal to trigger Mercure outbox projection — batchSize, retryDelaySeconds.
